subject: Project Alpha blocker summary
body: Hi Maya, current blockers are the customer import timeout, the pending risk template confirmation, and renewal export wording. I will update again after standup.

subject: Amazon invoice AB-44921 cost center
body: Forwarding the Amazon Business invoice for Project Alpha. Please use cost center PA-2047 for month-end close.

subject: Boston itinerary hotel change acknowledged
body: Thanks for the update. I acknowledge the Seaport Inn change and will use confirmation SI-8821 for check-in.

subject: Re: CloudDesk ticket 84217 opened
body: I retried the export and the customer list completed successfully. You can close ticket 84217.

subject: Re: Senior AI systems role - quick chat?
body: 3 PM Tuesday works. Please send the calendar hold and any background material you can share in advance.

subject: Re: Onboarding buddy request for new hire
body: Thanks, I will meet Leo after orientation and share the Project Alpha context deck before lunch.

subject: Re: Invoice approval needed: Harbor View cancellation
body: Please dispute the Harbor View fee. Since the hotel caused the overbooking, I do not approve the cancellation invoice yet.

subject: Monday standup coverage plan
body: I can start Monday standup with Alpha import status and then hand to Priya for Beta launch checklist updates.
